sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67084" key="mete/kduma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μετέκ-δυμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, in pl., <sense id="n67084.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">changes of clothing</tr_>, metaph., <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τύφου μ.</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Socr.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.4.59</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
